# Guardian Restoration Network

> Guardian Restoration Network provides 24/7 emergency restoration services across Oregon, Washington, and California.

## Business
- Legal name: Lulabella Management DBA Guardian Restoration Network
- Phone: 888-625-0666
- Website: https://guardianrestorationnetwork.com

## Services
- Water Damage Restoration
- Fire Damage Restoration
- Mold Remediation
- Storm Damage Restoration
- Sewage Cleanup & Biohazard Remediation
- Asbestos Abatement
- Reconstruction & General Contracting

## Service Areas
Oregon: Portland, Salem, Eugene, Bend, Medford, Corvallis
Washington: Seattle, Spokane, Tacoma, Vancouver, Bellevue, and 21 more cities
California: Los Angeles, San Diego, San Jose, San Francisco, Sacramento, and 66 more cities
Total: 103 cities across 3 states

## Key Information
- Available 24/7 for emergency dispatch
- Works directly with insurance companies
- Coverage confirmed before work begins
- You are responsible for your deductible per your policy
- Contractor dispatch subject to availability in your area

## Contact
https://guardianrestorationnetwork.com/contact/
